title: Aegis-Node Evidence Pack v1
description: Output of `aegis evidence cmmc` (ADR-011 + COMPLIANCE_MATRIX.md). Maps F9 ledger entries to NIST SP 800-171 controls so a C3PAO can ingest the bundle as evidence for CMMC 2.0 Level 2 assessment.

schemaVersion.description: Pack schema version. Bumped when the JSON shape changes incompatibly.

session_id.description: Session ID extracted from the ledger (uniform across all entries; null only for an empty ledger).

ledgerRootHex.description: Hex-encoded F9 chain root. `aegis verify <ledger>` re-derives this value.

ledgerSchemaVersion.description: Detected ledger schema. Foundation emits packs from v2 ledgers; v1 support is a compat shim follow-up.

since.description: Lower bound (inclusive of equal) of the date filter applied to the walk.

until.description: Upper bound (inclusive of equal) of the date filter applied to the walk.

generatedAt.description: Wallclock when this pack was generated.

entry_count.description: Number of ledger entries inspected (after date filtering).

controls_covered.description: Length of the `controls` map. Exposed at the top level so a glance suffices.

controls.description: Per-control evidence. Keys are NIST SP 800-171 control IDs (e.g. "3.3.1"); values describe the matching ledger evidence.
